Key Patterns — Trendshift

  • Claude Code ecosystem is exploding: 8 of top 20 projects are Claude Code skills/configs/plugins
  • Agent orchestration rising: Symphony, agentic frameworks, coding agent CLIs
  • Design + AI convergence: Penpot, Huashu Design, DESIGN.md files
  • Open-source catching up to paid AI: Free Claude Code, open voice AI, GitNexus

Cross-Reference Analysis

🔥 Wow + Money Overlap (Validated by Hype AND Revenue)

No direct project overlaps exist (Trendshift = open-source GitHub, TrustMRR = VC/bootstrapped startups), but category overlaps are strong:

  1. AI Sales/SDR Automation — GojiberryAI ($272k MRR, 53% growth) + DM Champ ($187k MRR) validate the agent-orchestration trend dominating Trendshift
  2. AI Coding Education — Codédex ($83k MRR) + "Build Your Own X" (496k stars) = massive demand for hands-on coding education
  3. AI Content Generation — Vid.AI ($95k MRR) + Lunchbreak ($47k MRR, AI humanizer) + AI Text Humanizer (16k stars) = full pipeline from generation to "making it look human"
  4. AI SEO/Marketing — SeoBOT ($70k MRR, 9% growth) + AEO Engine ($53k MRR) + PROSP ($128k MRR) = AI is eating marketing ops
  5. Social Media Tools — Postiz ($100k MRR, 17% growth) + Supergrow ($79k MRR) = scheduling/growth tools remain cash cows

💰 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About (TrustMRR-only, High Revenue)

  1. Stan ($3.57M MRR) — Creator economy platform, absolutely dominant revenue, zero Trendshift presence. The biggest sleeper on the list.
  2. TrimRx ($288k MRR, 9%) — GLP-1 telehealth. Riding the Ozempic wave. Not "tech-sexy" but printing money.
  3. Kibu ($234k MRR) — Niche health software for I/DD providers. 48 states, regulatory moat, zero competition hype.
  4. Dealsourcr ($156k MRR, 33%) — UK property deal sourcing. Boring, profitable, growing fast.
  5. BackPedal ($58k MRR, 48%) — GPS bike theft recovery. Hardware+subscription in a growing market.

🚀 Trending Projects With No Monetization (Opportunity Zone)

  1. Free Claude Code (16.5k stars) — Free tier for Claude Code. Obvious freemium/enterprise play.
  2. TradingAgents (53.7k stars) — Multi-agent trading framework. No SaaS wrapper yet. Massive fintech opportunity.
  3. Computer-Use Agents (14.7k stars) — Desktop AI agent infrastructure. The "AWS of computer use."
  4. GitNexus (31.7k stars) — Client-side code graph. Enterprise version could be huge (already noted "cloud in private beta").
  5. AI Text Humanizer (16.3k stars) — Open-source, but Lunchbreak makes $47k MRR doing the same thing. Proves the market.

Top Trends

  1. Claude Code is the new Linux — 8/20 Trendshift projects are Claude Code skills, configs, or plugins. The ecosystem is forming faster than any previous dev tool.
  2. AI SDR is a proven market — GojiberryAI ($272k, 53%), DM Champ ($187k), PROSP ($128k). Three startups collectively doing $600k+ MRR replacing sales reps.
  3. Open-source → SaaS pipeline is the play — Every hot GitHub project has a paid SaaS equivalent already running. The gap is shrinking.
  4. Health niches print money silently — TrimRx, Kibu, hormone prescribing = $673k combined MRR with zero hype.
  5. AI "humanizing" is booming both ways — Detection evasion tools (Lunchbreak $47k MRR) + open-source humanizers (16k stars). Cat-and-mouse market.

Money vs Hype Gap

  • Overhyped: Claude Code skill packs — tons of stars, zero direct monetization yet. Ecosystem is early.
  • Underhyped: Health/telehealth startups (Stan $3.5M, TrimRx $288k, Kibu $234k) — massive revenue, invisible to tech Twitter.
  • Most imbalanced: TradingAgents (53.7k stars, $0 revenue) vs actual quant funds. Someone needs to SaaS-wrap this.

Quick Takes

  • The "Claude Code industrial complex" is real. When your config file gets 94k stars, the platform has arrived. Anthropic is building the next VS Code ecosystem.
  • AI SDR startups will consolidate fast. GojiberryAI, DM Champ, and PROSP are all doing the same thing (AI outbound). Expect M&A within 6 months.
  • The stealth company at #23 with 166% growth ($68k MRR, AI ad management) is the one to watch. If that growth holds, it's at $500k+ by Q4.

Report generated: 2026-04-29 01:00 UTC Sources: trendshift.io, trustmrr.com
